text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It was like this last year, too, but it sure is hot by
the sea.
choice_data_list: Make sure to take care of your health.
Make sure to take care of your health.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I can't afford to have any setbacks
with my conditioning.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
After all, the Sprinters Stakes is waiting right
around the corner once summer camp is over!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unlike last year's camp, we're both more relaxed
and not overly eager this time. And I mean that in
a good way.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Let's make the most of this camp by training hard
and getting into tip-top shape!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, my second summer camp with Nishino
Flower gets underway.
